chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-02 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Main Case(Priority) 1.For orders on CMA 38/2024 2.For hearing of CMA 31/024 3.For hearing of main case. 30-01-2024 None present for the petitioners. M/s Aftab Ahmed Shar, Additional P.G & Agha Athar Pathan, Assistant A.G. ***** None present for the petitioners. Learned Additional P.G has filed statement on behalf of SSP, Khairpur (respondent No.2) and submitted that the case has already been disposed of in C-class. This petition having served its purpose is accordingly disposed of along with listed applications. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
